currency.description: Removes one Influenced Modifier from an item with at least two Influenced Modifiers and upgrades another Influenced Modifier. Upgrading a modifier of the highest tier transforms the modifier into an Elevated Modifier. Attempting to upgrade an Elevated Modifier rerolls its values. Can be used on Body Armours, Boots, Gloves and Helmets.
Adds an enchantment to a utility flask that will improve it but prevent it from gaining charges during its effect. Replaces any existing enchantment.
Adds an enchantment to a utility flask that will cause it to be used when certain conditions are met. Replaces any existing enchantment.

Unpredictably either upgrades a corrupted item to unique rarity or destroys it

Reroll all of Kirac's Atlas Missions, using uncompleted Maps where possible.
